create-pdf-with-custom-title-page.title: Create PDF with Custom Title Page
create-pdf-with-custom-title-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF, set document metadata and background color, add a title page with a custom font, size, and color, and handle platform‑specific saving issues.

insert-high-res-image-into-pdf.title: Insert High‑Resolution Image into PDF with Absolute Positioning
insert-high-res-image-into-pdf.description: Shows how to add a high‑resolution image to a PDF page at specific absolute coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.

create-searchable-pdf-from-scanned-image.title: Create Searchable PDF from Scanned Images
create-searchable-pdf-from-scanned-image.description: Shows how to load a scanned PDF, run OCR with Document.Convert to overlay invisible text, and save the result as a searchable PDF.

add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.title: Add Indented Paragraph with Line Spacing to PDF
add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextParagraph with first‑line and subsequent‑line indentation, sets word‑wrap, adds lines with extra line spacing, and appends the paragraph to a page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.title: Add Multi-Level Table of Contents to PDF
add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a hierarchical Table of Contents in an existing PDF by enabling auto‑tagging, processing paragraphs, creating a TOC element, inserting a dedicated page and configuring TocInfo.

custom-toc-formatting-with-tab-leaders.title: Custom TOC Formatting with Tab Leaders in PDF
custom-toc-formatting-with-tab-leaders.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a Table of Contents via the tagged content API, and customizes its appearance by setting tab leader types and disabling page numbers for specific TOC levels.

remove-page-from-pdf.title: Remove a Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
remove-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete a specific 1‑based page, and save the document, with remaining pages automatically renumbered.

insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.title: Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page at the beginning as a cover sheet, and save the modified document.

replace-text-in-pdf-preserving-formattin.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-text-in-pdf-preserving-formattin.description: Demonstrates how to find and replace a specific word in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the original text formatting intact.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save every image as a PNG file while preserving its original resolution.

add-digital-signature-to-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with a Self‑Signed Certificate
add-digital-signature-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a signature field on a PDF page and sign the document using a self‑signed PKCS#7 certificate with Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-a1a-compliance-report.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A‑1A Compliance and Generate Report
validate-pdf-a1a-compliance-report.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, validate it against the PDF/A‑1A standard, and write a detailed validation report to a file.

validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B compliance and log issues
validate-pdf-a1b-compliance.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to check a PDF file against the PDF/A‑1B standard and write any non‑conformant elements to a log file.

clean-pdf-remove-metadata-attachments-ja.title: Clean PDF by Removing Metadata, Attachments, and JavaScript
clean-pdf-remove-metadata-attachments-ja.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete all document metadata, embedded file attachments, and JavaScript actions, then optimize and save the cleaned file.

set-pdf-expiration.title: Set PDF Expiration with JavaScript
set-pdf-expiration.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF to automatically close the document after a specified expiration date.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to remove all interactive form fields from a PDF and render their current values as static content using Aspose.Pdf.

check-pdf-incremental-updates.title: Check PDF for Incremental Updates
check-pdf-incremental-updates.description: Loads a PDF file and determines whether it contains incremental updates, indicating that the document was modified after its initial creation.

convert-pdf-to-html.title: Convert PDF to HTML
convert-pdf-to-html.description: Loads a PDF file and saves it as an HTML document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.title: Add Accessibility Tags to PDF (Headings, Paragraphs, Table)
add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates enabling auto‑tagging and programmatically inserting heading, paragraph, and table elements with alternative text into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

attach-pdf-portfolio-set-custom-metadata.title: Attach PDF Portfolio and Set Custom Metadata
attach-pdf-portfolio-set-custom-metadata.description: Shows how to embed a PDF as a portfolio attachment, assign a description to the embedded file, and add custom metadata to the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-author-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Author and Title Metadata
update-pdf-author-title-metadata.description: The example opens an existing PDF, reads its current Author and Title metadata, updates these fields, and saves the modified document to a new file.

password-protect-pdf-with-permissions.title: Password Protect PDF with User and Owner Passwords
password-protect-pdf-with-permissions.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set user and owner passwords, define allowed permissions, encrypt the document with AES‑256, and save the protected file using Aspose.Pdf.

print-pdf-document-using-aspose-pdf-view.title: Print PDF Document Using Aspose.Pdf Viewer
print-pdf-document-using-aspose-pdf-view.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and sending it directly to the default printer using the built‑in Print method of PdfViewer.

interrupt-resume-large-pdf-save.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save Operation
interrupt-resume-large-pdf-save.description: Shows how to interrupt an asynchronous PDF save using Aspose.Pdf's InterruptMonitor and CancellationToken, then release resources and complete the save later.

generate-crash-report-pdf.title: Generate Crash Report PDF from Exception
generate-crash-report-pdf.description: Demonstrates catching an exception, creating an Aspose.Pdf crash report in HTML, and converting it to a PDF document.

embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf-and-verify.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify Attachment
embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf-and-verify.description: Demonstrates embedding a ZUGFeRD invoice XML file into a PDF, converting the PDF to ZUGFeRD (PDF/A‑3) compliance, and verifying that the XML attachment is present.

add-open-action-javascript-alert-to-pdf.title: Add Open-Action JavaScript Alert to PDF
add-open-action-javascript-alert-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that an alert dialog appears when the document is opened.

combine-html-fragments-to-pdf.title: Combine Multiple HTML Fragments into a Single PDF with Custom Rendering Options
combine-html-fragments-to-pdf.description: Shows how to convert a collection of HTML strings into one PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, applying custom HtmlLoadOptions such as separate pages and font embedding.

add-styled-table-with-alternating-row-co.title: Add Styled Table with Alternating Row Colors to PDF
add-styled-table-with-alternating-row-co.description: Demonstrates how to insert a table with borders and alternating row background colors into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a clickable link annotation that opens an external website within a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-image-in-pdf-page.title: Replace Image in PDF Page
replace-image-in-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on a specific PDF page with a new image while keeping the original layout using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Footer
add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.description: Shows how to insert dynamic page numbers into the footer of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

multi-section-pdf-different-page-sizes.title: Create Multi-Section PDF with Different Page Sizes and Orientations
multi-section-pdf-different-page-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing multiple pages, each with its own page size and portrait/landscape orientation, and adds simple text to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-two-pdfs-preserving-bookmarks.title: Merge Two PDFs Preserving Bookmarks
merge-two-pdfs-preserving-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF files into a single document while keeping the bookmarks (outlines) from both source PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-text-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Text from Specific PDF Pages to a Text File
extract-text-from-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text from a defined page range using TextAbsorber, and write the extracted content to a plain .txt file.

add-header-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Logo to PDF Pages
add-header-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a company logo as a header on every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ImageStamp.

set-pdf-document-properties.title: Set PDF Document Properties (Creation Date, Modification Date, Keywords)
set-pdf-document-properties.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign creation and modification dates and custom keywords via the document's Info property, and save the updated file.

create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.title: Create PDF with Embedded TrueType Font
create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.description: Shows how to embed a TrueType font into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and add a text fragment that uses the embedded font.

apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Image Watermark to PDF Pages
apply-semi-transparent-image-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent PNG image as a watermark on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clickable-table-of-contents-pdf.title: Create PDF with Clickable Table of Contents
clickable-table-of-contents-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document with a table of contents where each entry is a clickable link that navigates to the corresponding section page using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, clear all annotations, and save a clean, annotation‑free version.

add-signature-field-with-styled-appearan.title: Add Signature Field with Styled Appearance to PDF
add-signature-field-with-styled-appearan.description: Shows how to insert a signature form field into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and configure its default appearance, border, and background color to match the document style.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Permissions
encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, restrict printing and copying by setting permissions to none, and save the encrypted document.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded PDFs
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to bundle multiple PDF files into a single PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-documentinfo-xmp-metadata.title: Add Custom DocumentInfo and XMP Metadata to PDF
add-custom-documentinfo-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add custom key/value pairs to a PDF's DocumentInfo dictionary and embed custom XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

add-line-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Line Annotation with Color and Thickness to PDF
add-line-annotation-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a line annotation, set its color and border width, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-page-with-html.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML-Generated Page
replace-pdf-page-with-html.description: Shows how to replace a specific page in an existing PDF document with a page generated from HTML using Aspose.Pdf's HTML conversion capabilities.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Fields
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with two numeric input fields and a read‑only sum field, then attaching JavaScript actions to calculate and display the sum whenever the inputs change.

create-pdf-with-dynamic-table.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Table from DataTable
create-pdf-with-dynamic-table.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document containing a table whose rows are populated dynamically from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.

create-zugferd-compliant-pdf-invoice.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
create-zugferd-compliant-pdf-invoice.description: Demonstrates how to embed a ZUGFeRD XML invoice into a PDF and convert it to a ZUGFeRD‑compliant PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clickable-index-pdf.title: Create PDF with Clickable Index
clickable-index-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF that contains an index page with entries linked to separate content sections using link annotations and GoTo actions.

add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages Using a Template
add-background-image-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply a background page from a template PDF to every page of another PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageStamp.

add-custom-image-signature-last-page.title: Add Custom Image Signature to Last Page of PDF
add-custom-image-signature-last-page.description: Shows how to create a signature field on the last page of a PDF and overlay it with a custom signature image using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF portfolio, enumerate its embedded files, and save each file to a specified directory using Aspose.Pdf.

magazine-pdf-article-with-ad.title: Create Magazine-Style PDF with Article Text and Advertisement
magazine-pdf-article-with-ad.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing article text and a simple rectangular advertisement using Aspose.Pdf, including text formatting, shape drawing, and element positioning.

create-read-only-text-field-with-default.title: Create Read‑Only Text Field with Default Value in PDF
create-read-only-text-field-with-default.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextBoxField to a PDF, set a default value, and make the field read‑only using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.title: Create PDF with Clickable Email Link
create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.description: Shows how to generate a PDF and add a link annotation that opens the default mail client using a mailto: URI.

add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.title: Add Captions Below Images in PDF
add-captions-below-images-in-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through PDF pages and images and insert a styled text paragraph as a caption beneath each image using Aspose.Pdf.

add-popup-note-annotation.title: Add Pop‑up Note Annotation to PDF
add-popup-note-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextAnnotation (sticky note) with a linked PopupAnnotation that shows detailed information when hovered, and then saves the modified PDF.

create-pdf-header-with-current-date.title: Create PDF Header with Current Date Using JavaScript
create-pdf-header-with-current-date.description: Shows how to add a shared DateField to a PDF header that automatically displays the current date via JavaScript when the PDF is opened.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-trusted-timestam.title: Digitally Sign PDF with Trusted Timestamp
digitally-sign-pdf-with-trusted-timestam.description: Shows how to add a digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and include a timestamp from a trusted Time‑Stamp Authority.

create-pdf-custom-5x7-inch-page-size.title: Create PDF with Custom 5x7 Inch Page Size
create-pdf-custom-5x7-inch-page-size.description: Shows how to generate a PDF file with a custom 5 × 7 inch page size, suitable for postcard printing, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-background-to-pdf-p.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Color to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-background-to-pdf-p.description: Shows how to overlay a semi‑transparent colored rectangle on each page of a PDF to create a background using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-pdf-page-into-another.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF
insert-pdf-page-into-another.description: Demonstrates how to take a specific page from a source PDF and insert it into a target PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-dropdown-list.title: Create PDF with Dropdown List (ComboBox)
create-pdf-with-dropdown-list.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a combo box form field and populate its options from an array using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-count-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Page Count Footer to PDF Pages
add-page-count-footer-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a centered footer on each PDF page that displays the current page number and total page count using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, clear document‑level, page‑level, and annotation JavaScript actions, and save the sanitized file.

create-pdf-table-with-merged-header.title: Create PDF Table with Merged Header Cells
create-pdf-table-with-merged-header.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a table whose first header row spans all columns, using Aspose.Pdf for C#.

add-link-annotation-launch-pdf-attachmen.title: Create Link Annotation that Launches a PDF Attachment
add-link-annotation-launch-pdf-attachmen.description: Loads an existing PDF, embeds another PDF as a file attachment annotation, and adds a link annotation that opens the attached PDF when clicked.

create-landscape-pdf-page.title: Create Landscape PDF Page with Rotation
create-landscape-pdf-page.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page to landscape orientation, mark it as landscape, add a text fragment, and save the document while handling platform‑specific GDI+ availability.

add-checked-checkbox-form-field.title: Add Checked Checkbox Form Field to PDF
add-checked-checkbox-form-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF document, add a checkbox form field, set its default state to checked, and save the file.

extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.title: Extract and Print PDF Outline Hierarchy
extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.description: Loads a PDF file, accesses its outline (bookmark) collection, and recursively prints each outline title with indentation to visualize the hierarchy.

create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.title: Create PDF Table with Rich Text Formatting
create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF document containing a table where each cell can hold rich‑text fragments such as bold, italic, colored text, and multiple text fragments using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a semi‑transparent red text stamp, rotate it diagonally, and apply it to every page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers to PDF
add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a page‑number stamp to each page of a PDF, insert a new page, and update pagination so the numbers adjust automatically.

create-pdf-with-background-template.title: Create PDF with Background Template Using PdfPageStamp
create-pdf-with-background-template.description: Demonstrates how to use a PDF page as a background template for multiple pages by applying a PdfPageStamp in Aspose.Pdf and adding custom content on top.

add-visible-signature-and-lock-pdf.title: Add Visible Signature Field and Lock PDF
add-visible-signature-and-lock-pdf.description: Shows how to create a visible signature field in a PDF, sign it with a PKCS#7 certificate, and lock the field (or form) to prevent further modifications using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all its text using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

create-pdf-with-radio-button-groups.title: Create PDF with Radio Button Groups
create-pdf-with-radio-button-groups.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing multiple‑choice questions by adding radio button fields using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-total-calculation-to-pdf-.title: Add JavaScript Total Calculation to PDF Form
add-javascript-total-calculation-to-pdf-.description: Shows how to create a read‑only numeric field that automatically sums other numeric fields by attaching a JavaScript Calculate action in an Aspose.Pdf document.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, retrieve its embedded XMP metadata, and save it as an XML file.

create-multi-page-table-pdf.title: Create Multi‑Page Table in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-multi-page-table-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a table that automatically breaks across multiple pages, with a repeating header row, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-line-separator-annotation-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Line Separator Annotation to PDF Page
add-line-separator-annotation-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to insert a horizontal line annotation as a visual separator on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-90-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Pages to 90 Degrees
rotate-pdf-pages-90-degrees.description: Loads a PDF document, sets each page's rotation to 90 degrees for portrait display on landscape devices, and saves the modified file.

create-pdf-with-date-picker-form-field.title: Create PDF with Date Picker Form Field
create-pdf-with-date-picker-form-field.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document that contains a date picker (DateField) form field using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF to Text File
extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through pages and link annotations, collect external URI actions, and write the URLs to a plain‑text file.

load-pdf-into-document.title: Load PDF into Document
load-pdf-into-document.description: Shows how to load a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document object, verify its existence, and ensure proper disposal using a using block.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, clear every annotation on each page, and save the sanitized document.

remove-embedded-scripts-from-pdf.title: Remove Embedded JavaScript and Hidden Data from PDF
remove-embedded-scripts-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, removes any embedded JavaScript and clears page annotations, then saves a sanitized copy of the document.

sanitize-pdf-remove-private-info-metadat.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Private Info and Metadata
sanitize-pdf-remove-private-info-metadat.description: Shows how to load a PDF, remove private information and all metadata, and save the sanitized file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-rasterized-images-h.title: Convert PDF Pages to Rasterized Images in HTML
convert-pdf-pages-to-rasterized-images-h.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to save a PDF as HTML while rasterizing each page into PNG images with a resolution of 150 DPI.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG with 80% Quality and Optimize Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.description: The example loads a PDF, optimizes its embedded images using JPEG compression at quality 80, and then converts each page to a separate JPEG file with the same quality.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-without-compre.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images Without Compression
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-without-compre.description: Shows how to load a PDF, disable image compression, and export each page as a high‑quality JPEG using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-png.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through each page, and exporting every page as an individual PNG image file.

sanitize-pdf-page-rasterization.title: Sanitize PDF by Converting Pages to Images
sanitize-pdf-page-rasterization.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's HiddenDataSanitizer with all options enabled and manually enable page rasterization to remove hidden data while preserving visual appearance.

remove-annotations-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF
remove-annotations-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to flatten a PDF to strip all annotations and form fields, delete any embedded file attachments, and optionally clean up metadata before saving the cleaned document.

sanitize-pdfs-remove-metadata.title: Sanitize PDFs by Removing Metadata and Flattening Content
sanitize-pdfs-remove-metadata.description: Loads PDF files, removes metadata and compliance flags, optimizes resources, flattens forms/annotations, and saves cleaned PDFs to a target folder.

generate-pdf-crash-report.title: Generate PDF Crash Report on Exception
generate-pdf-crash-report.description: Demonstrates catching an Aspose.Pdf.PdfException, creating CrashReportOptions, and generating an HTML crash‑report file for troubleshooting.

customize-crash-report-filename.title: Customize Crash Report File Name with Aspose.Pdf
customize-crash-report-filename.description: Shows how to set a custom message and file name for an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions and generate the report with PdfException.GenerateCrashReport.

generate-crash-report-with-custom-output.title: Generate Crash Report with Custom Output Directory
generate-crash-report-with-custom-output.description: Demonstrates how to configure CrashReportOptions to set a custom directory and filename for an Aspose.Pdf crash report and verify that the report file is created.

generate-crash-report-for-pdf-errors.title: Generate Crash Report for PDF Processing Errors
generate-crash-report-for-pdf-errors.description: Demonstrates loading, processing, and saving a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while using try‑catch blocks to handle PdfException and generic exceptions, and generating detailed HTML crash reports.

add-level-1-heading-to-pdf.title: Add Level 1 Heading to PDF
add-level-1-heading-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a new PDF document, using the tagged‑content API to insert a level‑1 heading, setting language and title, and saving the file with platform‑specific GDI+ handling.

apply-decimal-numbering-to-headings.title: Apply Decimal Numbering to Hierarchical Headings
apply-decimal-numbering-to-headings.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to add Heading objects with decimal (Arabic) numbering and hierarchical levels, producing numbered chapters and sections in a PDF.

create-pdf-with-structured-headings-toc.title: Create PDF with Structured Headings and Table of Contents
create-pdf-with-structured-headings-toc.description: Shows how to add multiple Heading objects with different numbering styles and generate a structured Table of Contents using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content features.

add-outline-heading-to-pdf.title: Add Outline Heading to PDF Document
add-outline-heading-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a new heading into an existing PDF's outline (bookmarks) and link it to a specific page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Heading to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a heading with dynamic content (user name and date), position and style it, set PDF metadata, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-sanitize-pdf-headings.title: Create and Sanitize PDF Headings While Preserving Numbering
create-sanitize-pdf-headings.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with auto‑numbered headings using Aspose.Pdf, then create a sanitized version that retains only the heading elements and their numbering.

remove-hidden-data-and-auto-tag-headings.title: Remove Hidden Data and Auto‑Tag Headings in PDF
remove-hidden-data-and-auto-tag-headings.description: Loads a PDF, removes hidden information such as metadata and compliance flags, optimizes resources, then enables auto‑tagging to re‑apply heading structures before saving the cleaned document.

batch-sanitize-pdfs.title: Batch Sanitize PDFs and Save to Output Folder
batch-sanitize-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over a directory of PDF files, remove metadata, flatten forms and annotations, optimize resources, and save sanitized copies using Aspose.Pdf.

sanitize-pdf-hidden-data.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Data
sanitize-pdf-hidden-data.description: Shows a console application that loads a PDF, removes metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance information, optimizes resources, and saves a sanitized copy.

detect-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.title: Detect Hidden Annotations in a PDF
detect-hidden-annotations-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and scanning each page's annotations to identify any marked with Hidden or NoView flags.

sanitize-pdf-keep-metadata.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Content While Keeping Metadata
sanitize-pdf-keep-metadata.description: Shows how to configure HiddenDataSanitizerOptions to strip hidden annotations, search index, forms, layers, and JavaScript from a PDF while preserving its metadata, then save the sanitized file.

rasterize-pdf-to-png-with-compression.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with Compression Options
rasterize-pdf-to-png-with-compression.description: The example loads a PDF, configures PNG compression via ImageCompressionOptions, optimizes the document, and rasterizes each page to a lossless PNG image at a specified resolution.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution TIFF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set a custom DPI, and export each page as a separate high‑resolution TIFF file.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterate over each page, convert each page to a PNG image, and verify the number of generated images in a unit test.

roman-headings-pdf-validation.title: Create PDF with Roman Numeral Headings and Validate Sequence
roman-headings-pdf-validation.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with headings numbered in Roman numerals using Aspose.Pdf, then extracts the text to verify that the numbering sequence is correct.

create-clean-navigable-pdf-auto-tagging.title: Create Clean Navigable PDF with Auto‑Tagging and Headings
create-clean-navigable-pdf-auto-tagging.description: The example shows how to enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging for PDF sanitization and programmatically add heading and paragraph structure elements to generate an accessible, navigable PDF.

generate-custom-crash-report-pdf.title: Generate Custom Crash Report for PDF Operations
generate-custom-crash-report-pdf.description: Demonstrates catching a PDF exception, wrapping it in a PdfException, configuring CrashReportOptions with a custom debug message, and generating an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-crash-report-to-network-share.title: Generate Crash Report to Network Share with Aspose.Pdf
generate-crash-report-to-network-share.description: This example shows how to configure Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions to write a crash report to a network share (UNC path) and verify that the report file is created.

log-pdf-sanitization-times.title: Log PDF Sanitization Start and End Times
log-pdf-sanitization-times.description: Shows how to load a PDF, enable signature sanitization, record start and end timestamps, validate (triggering sanitization), and save the sanitized document while writing an audit log.

pdf-sanitizer-service.title: Directory PDF Sanitizer Service
pdf-sanitizer-service.description: Monitors a folder for new PDF files, removes metadata, flattens content, optimizes resources, and moves the sanitized PDFs to an archive folder.
